close_reason: Style: expect() in test for known-good data is fine
description: secretx-k8s/src/lib.rs:124-128. .expect("len==1 guarantees one entry") is fine; the comment justifies it. Mild taste preference: pattern-match the BTreeMap on size more directly via .pop_first() or explicit destructure. No engineering reason to change. Filing as opinion-tagged so it does not count as a real flag.
title: Tests pass with len-1 unwrap; consider into_iter().next() over .expect()
